Sports Scene

Copied

A view of a CMG vehicle in front of the Eiffel Tower in Paris, France. /CMG

The Chief Executive Officer (CEO) of the Olympic Broadcasting Services (OBS) has expressed his gratitude to the China Media Group (CMG) for what he called "exceptional" public signal service during the 2024 Paris Summer Olympics.

OBS chief Yiannis Exarchos highlighted the global impact of the Paris Games, attributing much of its success to CMG's outstanding broadcasting efforts.

The letter commended CMG for its pioneering work in producing 8K signals, marking a significant milestone in broadcasting technology.

Exarchos extended special congratulations and expressed eagerness for further collaboration with CMG in exploring cutting-edge technology.

He also praised CMG's spirit of excellence and meticulousness, while looking forward to future engagements with CMG.

title: OBS chief lauds CMG for 'exemplary' public signal service at Olympics - CGTN
